[e][h]Brawl Stars Championship 2026: Chinese Mainland April Monthly Finals
League Information
Series:
Brawl Stars Championship 2026
Organizer:
Supercell
Game:
荒野乱斗
Type:
Online
Location:
 China
 Hong Kong
 Taiwan
 Macau
Format:
Single-elimination
Prize Pool:
¥11,000 CNY
(≃ $1,613 USD)
Date:
2026-04-18
Teams:
8
Liquipedia Tier:
B-Tier 
Links
Chronology
March Monthly Finals
May Monthly Finals

About

[edit]

Broadcast Talent

[edit]
  • Commentator:
    •  王子

Format

[edit]
  • Qualified are 8 teams from Monthly Qualifier
  • Single-elimination bracket
  • All matches are Bo5xBo3

Prize Pool

[edit]
¥11,000 CNY (≃ $1,613 USD) are spread among the participants as seen below:
